code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:5032/api/FantasyFootball';export const GetAgeGroupFantasyStats=async ageGroup=>{try{const url=API_URL+'/ageGroup/';const response=await axios.get(url+ageGroup);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetSeasonFantasyStats=async seasonId=>{try{const url=API_URL+'/season/';const response=await axios.get(url+seasonId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetFixtureFantasyStats=async fixtureId=>{try{const url=API_URL+'/fixture/';const response=await axios.get(url+fixtureId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};
